United will either be fifth, if we win today, or seventh after Everton made the most of another game in hand with victory over Hull City yesterday. Arsenal lost again, at West Brom, while Manchester City and Liverpool meet in the later kick-off.

United are on the longest current unbeaten run in the Premier League (17 matches) while Boro have gone the longest without a win (10 games). Remember, United did play on Thursday night though, which could be a factor this afternoon.
